window.label: Entire history
window.phrase: the entire available history up to 2026-07-22

evidence.claim: On July 25, 2024, Masdar signed a joint study agreement to explore the expansion of the 145MW Cirata floating solar plant in Indonesia.
evidence.snippet: Masdar signed a joint study agreement with PLN IP to explore a significant expansion of the 145MW Cirata floating solar project.

evidence.claim: Mubadala Energy announced a major deepwater gas discovery at the Tangkulo-1 exploration well in the South Andaman block on August 12, 2024.
evidence.snippet: Mubadala Energy confirmed a significant deepwater gas discovery in the South Andaman block, bolstering Indonesia's long-term energy security plans.

evidence.claim: DP World initiated operational testing of the expanded USD 1.2 billion Maspion Container Terminal in East Java on October 15, 2024.
evidence.snippet: DP World and Maspion Group commenced testing of the logistics and container terminal in Gresik, strengthening vital trade corridors.

evidence.claim: G42 subsidiary Presight partnered with Indonesia's Ministry of Health on November 8, 2024, to deploy advanced AI-driven genomic platforms.
evidence.snippet: Presight, a G42 company, teamed up with Indonesia's health ministry to implement advanced AI analytics for national healthcare programs.

evidence.claim: The UAE and Indonesia marked the second anniversary of their CEPA on September 1, 2024, noting a 25 percent trade increase to USD 4.5 billion.
evidence.snippet: Officials marked two years of the UAE-Indonesia Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement, showcasing bilateral non-oil trade reaching USD 4.5 billion.

evidence.claim: The Abu Dhabi Fund for Development (ADFD) approved a USD 50 million loan for rural road infrastructure development in Sumatra on December 12, 2024.
evidence.snippet: ADFD allocated USD 50 million to support the construction of key provincial roads and agricultural logistics infrastructure across Sumatra.

evidence.claim: Indonesian defense manufacturer PT Pindad signed a joint production agreement with UAE's EDGE Group on October 22, 2024, for tactical ammunition.
evidence.snippet: PT Pindad and EDGE Group finalized an agreement to co-produce specialized tactical ammunition and light armored vehicle components.

evidence.claim: Etihad Airways doubled its passenger flight frequency between Abu Dhabi and Jakarta from 7 to 14 weekly flights, starting January 15, 2025.
evidence.snippet: Etihad Airways doubled its flight frequencies to Jakarta to accommodate rising business and tourism demands between the two nations.

evidence.claim: ADQ entered discussions for a USD 1 billion co-investment framework with the Indonesia Investment Authority (INA) on February 20, 2025.
evidence.snippet: Abu Dhabi's ADQ and the Indonesia Investment Authority explored joint opportunities in transport, infrastructure, and pharmaceutical supply chains.

evidence.claim: Masdar partnered with Indonesia's Pertamina Power on March 18, 2025, to explore a 500MW geothermal energy project in West Java.
evidence.snippet: Masdar and Pertamina Geothermal Energy agreed to collaborate on exploring a 500-megawatt geothermal development project in West Java.

edges.claim: On July 25, 2024, Masdar signed a joint study agreement to explore the expansion of the 145MW Cirata floating solar plant in Indonesia.
Mubadala Energy announced a major deepwater gas discovery at the Tangkulo-1 exploration well in the South Andaman block on August 12, 2024.
DP World initiated operational testing of the expanded USD 1.2 billion Maspion Container Terminal in East Java on October 15, 2024.
G42 subsidiary Presight partnered with Indonesia's Ministry of Health on November 8, 2024, to deploy advanced AI-driven genomic platforms.
The UAE and Indonesia marked the second anniversary of their CEPA on September 1, 2024, noting a 25 percent trade increase to USD 4.5 billion.
The Abu Dhabi Fund for Development (ADFD) approved a USD 50 million loan for rural road infrastructure development in Sumatra on December 12, 2024.
Indonesian defense manufacturer PT Pindad signed a joint production agreement with UAE's EDGE Group on October 22, 2024, for tactical ammunition.
Etihad Airways doubled its passenger flight frequency between Abu Dhabi and Jakarta from 7 to 14 weekly flights, starting January 15, 2025.
ADQ entered discussions for a USD 1 billion co-investment framework with the Indonesia Investment Authority (INA) on February 20, 2025.
